title: Implement JWT Authentication
input_format: User credentials for login, JWT token for protected routes
output_format: JWT tokens on login, protected resource data or error responses
constraints: Access tokens expire in 1 hour. Refresh tokens expire in 7 days. Must validate token signature and expiration. Must hash passwords with bcrypt.
function_signature: class AuthService { register(email: string, password: string): Promise<User>; login(email: string, password: string): Promise<TokenPair>; verifyToken(token: string): Promise<TokenPayload>; refreshToken(refreshToken: string): Promise<TokenPair>; }
